REPLY MEMORANDUM RE DISTRIBUTION OF RESIDUAL SETTLEMENT PROCEEDS

MOTION TO DISTRIBUTE RESIDUAL SETTLEMENT PROCEEDS AND ATTORNEY FEES. COUNSEL APPEARED. MATTER ARGUED. THE RESIDUAL PROCEEDS OF $243,000.00 WERE DISTRIBUTED AS FOLLOWS: $126,000.00 TO THE FOLLOWING CHARITABLE ORGANIZATIONS WHICH PROVIDE FREE MEDICAL COUNSELING AND RADIOLOGICAL SERVICES TO INDIGENT INDIVIDUALS: $30,000.00 TO THE MOBILE X-RAY VAN OPERATED UCSF MEDICAL CENTER (FREE BREAST CANCER SCREENING); $30,000.00 TO SF GENERAL HOSPITAL (FULL RANGE OF RADIOLOGICAL SERVICES); $15,000.00 TO INDIAN HEALTH CENTER OF SANTA CLARA VALLEY (DENTAL RADIOLOGICAL SERVICES ONLY); $30,000.00 TO UCSF ORGAN TRANSPLANT SERVICES; AND $3,500.00 EACH TO HAIGHT ASHBURY FREE CLINICS, INC.; WOMEN'S COMMUNITY CLINIC; ST. ANTHONY'S FREE MEDICAL CLINIC; SAN FRANCISCO FREE CLINIC; NORTH OF MARKET SENIOR SERVICES AND COLE STREET YOUTH CLINIC. EACH CHARITABLE ORGANIZATION SHOULD PREPARE A MISSION STATEMENT ATTACHED TO DECLARATION BEFORE DISTRIBUTION OF FUNDS, EACH RECEIPIAN SHOULD ACKNOWLEDGE RECEIPT OF FUNDS AND DECLARATION THAT FUNDS BE USED FOR CHARITABLE PURPOSES WITHIN ONE YEAR. THE REMAINING $117,000.00 WERE AWARDED TO THE FOLLOWING FIVE FIRMS SUBSEQUENT TO COURT'S FINAL AWARD OF FEES: $22,500.00 TO LAW OFFICES OF FRANCIS O. SCARPULLA; $22,500.00 TO COOPER & KIRKHAM; $40,000.00 TO LIEFF, CABRASER, HEIMANN & BERNSTEIN, LLP; $7,500.00 TO SAVERI & SAVERI AND $22,500.00 TO TRUMP, ALIOTO, TRUMP & PRESCOTT LLP. PLTF COUNSEL MR. SCARPULLA TO PREPARE ORDER WITH EXACT AMOUNT AND MR. SCHONBRUN TO APPROVE AS TO FORM. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: C. LI; REPORTER: PATRICIA M. EVEZICH, CSR #1193 (503)

MINI MINUTES: MOTION TO DISTRIBUTE RESIDUAL SETTLEMENT PROCEEDS AND ATTORNEY FEES
APPEARANCE: FOR PLAINTIFFS: FRANCIS O. SCARPULLA, 788-7210; jOSEF D. COOPER, 788-3030; R. ALEXANDER SAVERI, 217-6810 AND MARIO N. ALIOTO 563-7200. FOR OBJECTOR FRED SONDHEIMER: LAWRENCE W. SCHONBRUN, (510)547-8070
RULING: MATTER ARGUED. THE RESIDUAL PROCEEDS OF $243,000.00 WERE DISTRIBUTED AS FOLLOWS: $126,000.00 TO THE FOLLOWING CHARITABLE ORGANIZATIONS WHICH PROVIDE FREE MEDICAL COUNSELING AND RADIOLOGICAL SERVICES TO INDIGENT INDIVIDUALS: $30,000.00 TO THE MOBILE X-RAY VAN OPERATED UCSF MEDICAL CENTER (FREE BREAST CANCER SCREENING); $30,000.00 TO SF GENERAL HOSPITAL (FULL RANGE OF RADIOLOGICAL SERVICES); $15,000.00 TO INDIAN HEALTH CENTER OF SANTA CLARA VALLEY (DENTAL RADIOLOGICAL SERVICES ONLY); $30,000.00 TO UCSF ORGAN TRANSPLANT SERVICES; AND $3,500.00 EACH TO HAIGHT ASHBURY FREE CLINICS, INC.; WOMEN'S COMMUNITY CLINIC; ST. ANTHONY'S FREE MEDICAL CLINIC; SAN FRANCISCO FREE CLINIC; NORTH OF MARKET SENIOR SERVICES AND COLE STREET YOUTH CLINIC. EACH CHARITABLE ORGANIZATION SHOULD PREPARE A MISSION STATEMENT ATTACHED TO DECLARATION BEFORE DISTRIBUTION OF FUNDS, EACH RECEIPIAN SHOULD ACKNOWLEDGE RECEIPT OF FUNDS AND DECLARATION THAT FUNDS BE USED FOR CHARITABLE PURPOSES WITHIN ONE YEAR.
THE REMAINING $117,000.00 WERE AWARDED TO THE FOLLOWING FIVE FIRMS SUBSEQUENT TO COURT'S FINAL AWARD OF FEES: $22,500.00 TO LAW OFFICES OF FRANCIS O. SCARPULLA; $22,500.00 TO COOPER & KIRKHAM; $40,000.00 TO LIEFF, CABRASER, HEIMANN & BERNSTEIN, LLP; $7,500.00 TO SAVERI & SAVERI AND $22,500.00 TO TRUMP, ALIOTO, TRUMP & PRESCOTT LLP. PLTF COUNSEL MR. SCARPULLA TO PREPARE ORDER WITH EXACT AMOUNT AND MR. SCHONBRUN TO APPROVE AS TO FORM. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: C. LI; REPORTER: PATRICIA M. EVEZICH, CSR #1193 (503)
